reason: Source-depth and avatar repairs for Johnny Ho.

sources.title: Johnny Ho ScaleUp:AI speaker profile
sources.reason: ScaleUp:AI identifies Johnny Ho as Perplexity co-founder and Chief Strategy Officer, and says he leads product.

sources.title: Perplexity AI company page
sources.reason: Company page lists Johnny Ho among Perplexity founders.

cards.title: Perplexity 联合创始人与首席战略官
cards.content: ScaleUp:AI 资料页将 Johnny Ho 描述为 Perplexity 联合创始人兼首席战略官，并说明他负责产品。

cards.title: Perplexity 创始团队来源
cards.content: Perplexity AI 公司页列出 Aravind Srinivas、Denis Yarats、Johnny Ho 和 Andy Konwinski 为创始人。

cards.title: 产品方向负责人
cards.content: ScaleUp:AI 资料页称 Johnny Ho 在 Perplexity 负责产品，补齐 Perplexity 创始团队中的产品和战略视角。

cards.title: 工程与 Quora 背景
cards.content: ScaleUp:AI 资料页记录 Johnny Ho 创办 Perplexity 前曾在 Quora 做工程师，这为其产品工程背景提供线索。

cards.title: IOI 金牌竞赛背景
cards.content: ScaleUp:AI 资料页记录 Johnny Ho 是三届国际信息学奥林匹克金牌得主，2012 年曾以满分排名世界第一。

avatars.evidenceNote: ScaleUp:AI profile page is titled Johnny Ho, identifies him as Perplexity co-founder and Chief Strategy Officer, and embeds this speaker portrait image.
